output_buffer.c(3) Library Functions Manual output_buffer.c(3)

NAME

output_buffer.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void ob_reserve (outbuf_t *ob, size_t need)
void ob_putc (outbuf_t *ob, char c)
void ob_write (outbuf_t *ob, const char *s, size_t n)
void ob_term (outbuf_t *ob)
void ob_u8 (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t v)
void ob_u32 (outbuf_t *ob, uint32_t v)
void emit_set_truecolor_fg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
void emit_set_truecolor_bg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
void emit_reset (outbuf_t *ob)
bool rep_is_profitable (uint32_t runlen)
void emit_rep (outbuf_t *ob, uint32_t extra)
void emit_set_256_color_fg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t color_idx)
void emit_set_256_color_bg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t color_idx)
void emit_set_fg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
void emit_set_bg (outbuf_t *ob, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)

Function Documentation

void emit_rep (outbuf_t * ob, uint32_t extra)

Definition at line 156 of file output_buffer.c.

156                                             {
157   if (!ob)
158     return;
159   // ESC [ extra b
160   ob_putc(ob, 0x1b);
161   ob_putc(ob, '[');
162   ob_u32(ob, extra);
163   ob_putc(ob, 'b');
164 }




References ob_putc(), and ob_u32().

    rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_256color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_halfblocks_scalar(), and
    rgb_to_truecolor_halfblocks_scalar().

void
  emit_set_256_color_bg (outbuf_t * ob, uint8_t color_idx)


Definition at line 177 of file output_buffer.c.


177                                                             {
178   if (!ob)
179     return;
180   // Use pre-cached color sequence instead of building on-demand
181   uint8_t seq_len;
182   const char *seq = get_sgr256_bg_string(color_idx, &seq_len);
183   ob_write(ob, seq, seq_len);
184 }

void
  emit_set_bg (outbuf_t * ob, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)


Definition at line 201 of file output_buffer.c.


201                                                                 {
202   if (!ob)
203     return;
204   // ESC[48;2;R;G;Bm
205   ob_putc(ob, 0x1b);
206   ob_putc(ob, '[');
207   ob_write(ob, "48;2;", 5);
208   ob_u8(ob, r);
209   ob_putc(ob, ';');
210   ob_u8(ob, g);
211   ob_putc(ob, ';');
212   ob_u8(ob, b);
213   ob_putc(ob, 'm');

References ob_reserve().

    emit_reset(), emit_set_bg(), emit_set_fg(),
    emit_set_truecolor_bg(), emit_set_truecolor_fg(),

void
  ob_reserve (outbuf_t * ob, size_t need)


Definition at line 22 of file output_buffer.c.


22                                            {
23   if (!ob)
24     return;
25   if (ob->cap == 0) {
26     // Always allocate at least default capacity on first call
27     size_t ncap = 4096;
28     while (ncap < ob->len + need)
29       ncap = (ncap * 3) / 2;
30     // SAFE_REALLOC handles NULL ptr as malloc - this is safe
31     ob->buf = SAFE_REALLOC(ob->buf, ncap, char *);
32     ob->cap = ncap;
33   } else if (ob->len + need > ob->cap) {
34     // Expand existing buffer
35     size_t ncap = ob->cap;
36     while (ncap < ob->len + need)
37       ncap = (ncap * 3) / 2;
38     ob->buf = SAFE_REALLOC(ob->buf, ncap, char *);
39     ob->cap = ncap;
40   }
41 }






Referenced by ansi_compress_rle(),
    ansi_expand_rle(), ob_putc(), ob_term(),
    ob_u32(), and ob_write().






void
  ob_term (outbuf_t * ob)


Definition at line 58 of file output_buffer.c.


58                            {
59   if (!ob)
60     return;
61   // Reserve space for null terminator if needed
62   if (ob->len >= ob->cap) {
63     ob_reserve(ob, 1);
64   }
65   // Append null terminator WITHOUT incrementing length
66   // (null terminator is not part of the string length)
67   ob->buf[ob->len] = '\0';
68 }






References ob_reserve().


Referenced by ansi_compress_rle(),
    ansi_expand_rle(), image_print(),
    rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_256color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_halfblocks_scalar(), and
    rgb_to_truecolor_halfblocks_scalar().






void
  ob_u32 (outbuf_t * ob, uint32_t v)


Definition at line 92 of file output_buffer.c.


92                                       {
93   if (!ob)
94     return;
95   char tmp[10];
96   int i = 0;
97   do {
98     tmp[i++] = '0' + (v % 10u);
99     v /= 10u;
100   } while (v);
101   ob_reserve(ob, (size_t)i);
102   while (i--)
103     ob->buf[ob->len++] = tmp[i];
104 }






References ob_reserve().


Referenced by emit_rep().






void
  ob_u8 (outbuf_t * ob, uint8_t v)


Definition at line 71 of file output_buffer.c.


71                                     {
72   if (!ob)
73     return;
74   if (v >= 100) {
75     uint8_t d0 = v / 100;
76     uint8_t r = v % 100;
77     uint8_t d1 = r / 10;
78     uint8_t d2 = r % 10;
79     ob_putc(ob, '0' + d0);
80     ob_putc(ob, '0' + d1);
81     ob_putc(ob, '0' + d2);
82   } else if (v >= 10) {
83     uint8_t d1 = v / 10;
84     uint8_t d2 = v % 10;
85     ob_putc(ob, '0' + d1);
86     ob_putc(ob, '0' + d2);
87   } else {
88     ob_putc(ob, '0' + v);
89   }
90 }






References ob_putc().


Referenced by emit_set_bg(), emit_set_fg(),
    emit_set_truecolor_bg(), and emit_set_truecolor_fg().






void
  ob_write (outbuf_t * ob, const char * s, size_t n)


Definition at line 50 of file output_buffer.c.


50                                                      {
51   if (!ob || n == 0)
52     return;
53   ob_reserve(ob, n);
54   SAFE_MEMCPY(ob->buf + ob->len, ob->cap - ob->len, s, n);
55   ob->len += n;
56 }






References ob_reserve().

    ansi_expand_rle(), emit_set_256_color_bg(),

    image_print(), rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar(),

    rgb_to_truecolor_halfblocks_scalar().






bool rep_is_profitable (uint32_t runlen)


Definition at line 148 of file output_buffer.c.


148                                         {
149   if (runlen <= 2)
150     return false;
151   uint32_t k = runlen - 1;                           // Extra repetitions beyond the first character
152   uint32_t rep_cost = (uint32_t)(digits_u32(k) + 3); // ESC [ digits b
153   return k > rep_cost;                               // Manual repetition cost vs REP cost
154 }






Referenced by ansi_compress_rle(), image_print(),
    rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_256color_halfblocks_scalar(),
    rgb_to_halfblocks_scalar(), and
    rgb_to_truecolor_halfblocks_scalar().
